description_long: This is a pair of ornate epaulette-style jewelry pieces, each featuring a fan-shaped design with a rich purple base bordered by a gold scalloped edge. The central area is adorned with an intricate floral motif in white and gold, giving the pieces a regal and ceremonial appearance. The upper section of each piece extends into a rectangular tab, possibly for attachment to clothing or as a decorative accent. The surface is highly detailed, with the gold border and floral patterns standing out against the deep purple background. The craftsmanship suggests a blend of textile and metallic materials, with a focus on visual richness and traditional aesthetics. These pieces are likely intended for display on the shoulders or as statement accessories in formal or ceremonial attire.
description: A pair of ornate, fan-shaped epaulette jewelry pieces with gold scalloped edges, purple backgrounds, and intricate white floral motifs.
description_view_0: Both jewelry pieces are seen from above, highlighting their symmetrical fan shapes, gold borders, and central floral motifs.
description_view_1: The pieces are viewed at an angle, emphasizing the raised texture of the gold edging and the depth of the floral design.
description_view_2: A direct view of the opposite side, showing the mirrored arrangement and the full extent of the gold scalloped border.
description_view_3: An angled perspective from the other side, revealing the thickness and layered construction of the pieces.
